General.Name: Everchina International Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: EverChina Int'l Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, primarily engages in the property investment and hotel operations in the People's Republic of China and Bolivia. It operates through Property Investment Operation, Hotel operation, Agricultural Operation, Securities Investment and Financing Operation, and Resources segments. The company is involved in the leasing of commercial premises, as well as car parking space rental; mining and production of manganese products; securities investment and financing operations; and provision of corporate management services. It also engages in the raising and sale of cattle, as well as agricultural farming activities; and sale of soybean, corn, and rice. The company was formerly known as Interchina Holdings Company Limited and changed its name to EverChina Int'l Holdings Company Limited in February 2014. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Capital Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
